svg.text: Sample diagnosis preview
A README-ready snapshot of the kind of evidence-backed report the skill is designed to produce.
Critical
Executive verdict: stale evidence is being replayed as current truth
Top finding
Operational answers can bypass real inspection.
The agent sounds certain before any required probe runs.
Root cause: tool discipline exists in prompt prose,
not in code gates.
Evidence pack
logs/hermes.log: first reply had no shell_exec call
memory.db: stale PID artifact survived restart
runtime.rs: tool rule enforced by prompt only
Every finding stays tied to files, rows, or payloads.
Contamination path
1. Session history preserved an old tool result.
2. Distillation promoted that result too early.
3. Long-term memory replayed it without freshness checks.
4. Final answer shaping made the stale result sound clean.
That is not one bug. It is a layered self-sabotage chain.
Ordered fix plan
1. Hard-gate mandatory probes in code for operational queries.
2. Stop same-session artifacts from re-entering the same turn.
3. Tighten memory admission and distillation trigger policy.
4. Move internal handoff from markdown prose to typed JSON.
5. Remove hidden repair brains in the platform transport layer.
The report is meant to feel surgical: prove the damage path, rank the risk, then force fixes where the wrapper currently relies on vibes.
